liked_examples: Travel dashboard layout with airy cards, soft surfaces, and clear workspace zoning
Restaurant POS order and payment panels with fast status reading and modular summaries
Fintech marketing page with crisp white canvas, muted accents, and restrained visual noise
Full-height left sidebar shell where the right workspace feels embedded inside the same frame
must_keep: full-height left shell navigation with strong current-state emphasis
warm neutral canvas with restrained but unmistakable City brand accents
modular cards, summary strips, and panels that make task grouping obvious
high scannability for status, totals, and transactional information
must_avoid: small or timid sidebar treatment that loses the immersive shell effect
blue-first SaaS color direction disconnected from the City brand
heavy gradients, neon glow, or decorative effects that reduce clarity

component_examples.navigation: full-height dark rail with soft active pill and premium shell feel
component_examples.cards: warm inset cards with rounded geometry, subtle border, and controlled shadow
component_examples.forms: grouped forms with explicit labels, generous spacing, and premium-but-practical typography
component_examples.tables: compact transactional tables with readable status and summary rows
